Company Size & Growth — Germany
Does company size predict high growth? Two views of the same data.
CATEGORY · 2023 (follows global year filter)
The 50–249 employee band achieves the highest growth rate in 7 of 8 categories — despite representing only ~23% of companies in the dataset. Large enterprises (1,000+) consistently show the lowest growth rates across all categories.
Evolution of Growth Categories in Germany (2020–2023)
% of companies qualifying per category · 3-year rolling CAGR · Click legend to toggle individual lines
Note: Data coverage varies by year — 2020: 29.0%, 2021: 35.0%, 2022: 42.4%, 2023: 57.6% of companies have sufficient data for classification.
